message:
Your dog's nose is one of a kind — and we mean that literally. Just like our fingerprints, every dog's nose has its own unique pattern of ridges and bumps, and no two are ever exactly alike. 🐶👃

It's also a scent superpower: dogs carry up to 300 million scent receptors in that nose (we humans get a mere 6 million), which is how they can sniff out a single treat hidden three rooms away.

Tag a dog whose nose always knows the very second snacks come out! 🐾
